channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The NFL announces the Steelers will play in Dublin in 2025 for Ireland's first regular-season game
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Dublin will host Ireland’s first NFL regular-season game when the Pittsburgh Steelers play at historic Croke Park in 2025, the league announced Friday, two days before the Chiefs and Eagles meet in the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Swiss ski star Marco Odermatt says 'everything was perfect' in dominant super-G victory at worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — “One of the best super-G skiers of all time Marco is just in another league.” Marco Odermatt's rivals were left in awe Friday after the Swiss ski star dominated the super-G at the Alpine world championships, justifying his status as the big pre-race favorite.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL great Brett Favre praises Trump for taking action to protect women’s sports
item.description: Former NFL star Brett Favre spoke out on X in favor of President Donald Trump's latest executive order which effectively banned transgender athletes from competing in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The revamped Superdome is set to host its 8th Super Bowl after half a century of memorable moments
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — NFL coach Sean Payton remains a fan of the nearly 50-year-old Superdome, where he paced the home sideline for 15 seasons.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Josh Allen wins NFL's Most Valuable Player award
item.description: Josh Allen edged two-time winner Lamar Jackson for the AP NFL Most Valuable Player award in the closest race since Matt Ryan beat out Tom Brady in 2016.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canelo Alvarez changes course, drops Jake Paul fight to sign big deal with Riyadh Season
item.description: Canelo Alvarez has agreed to a four-fight deal with Riyadh Season, with the Mexican superstar leveraging a widely speculated bout with Jake Paul for a much bigger contract.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Does Mahomes get special treatment from refs? Expert says no way
item.description: The officials have been nearly as big of a story as the players on the field thanks to mostly online conspiracy theories that NFL officials are biased in favor of Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James becomes oldest player to score 40 points in NBA history, dropping 42 in Lakers' victory
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Age is more than just a number to LeBron James. It's also a target. The 40-year-old James became the oldest player to score 40 points in an NBA game Thursday night, putting up a season-high 42 in the Los Angeles Lakers' 120-112 victory over the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's how the new NBA All-Star Game format works
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is coming to Chase Center for the first time on Feb. 16, but the game will not look like the All-Star Games that NBA fans are accustomed to.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Josh Allen wins AP NFL Most Valuable Player award
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Josh Allen wanted to leave New Orleans with different hardware. Still, he's happy to be recognized for his accomplishments. Allen edged two-time winner Lamar Jackson for the AP NFL Most Valuable Player award in the closest race since Matt Ryan beat out Tom Brady in 2016.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Josh Allen beat out Lamar Jackson for AP NFL MVP
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — For the past 11 seasons, being named the AP first-team All-Pro quarterback was a prelude to winning the NFL’s MVP award. There was some logic to that with quarterbacks providing the most value to a team and the same panel picking the All-Pro team and all of the awards.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe make the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Antonio Gates, Jared Allen, Eric Allen and Sterling Sharpe were voted into the Pro Football Hall of Fame in the smallest induction class in 20 years following offseason rule changes meant to make it harder to get inducted.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl champ Ed McCaffrey a 'big believer' in safe gun ownership, gives advice on responsible handling
item.description: Three-time Super Bowl champion Ed McCaffrey recently teamed up with Colt to spread awareness on safe gun ownership and shared his advice.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: MLB owners vote to install John Seidler as control person of San Diego Padres
item.description: Baseball owners voted Thursday to install John Seidler, the oldest brother of the late former Padres chairman Peter Seidler, as the team’s control person.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs hire former USF head coach Charlie Strong as defensive line coach
item.description: According to NFL Network's Ian Rapoport, the Bucs have hired former USF head coach Charlie Strong to be their new defensive line coach.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Artist explains how New Orleans childhood inspired Super Bowl logo
item.description: Months before the Chiefs and Eagles earned a ticket to Super Bowl LIX, the NFL design team asked Tajh to create both theme art and the logo for Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Amy Russo, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers legend Steve Young believes football was made for girls
item.description: ATHERTON, Calif. - Steve Young is fully invested in one of Silicon Valley's newest startups - girls flag football. Whether it's the size of the field. "The front line you don't see. You see the cone here? Every first down is a cone." The size of the ball.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Cooper Kupp says the Rams intend to trade him. He's disappointed to end his 8 years with the team
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Receiver Cooper Kupp says the Los Angeles Rams are attempting to trade him after eight seasons with the club, and he doesn't like the decision.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Jey Uso set to headline WrestleMania Vegas as outrage over Royal Rumble divides fans
item.description: Jey Uso won the 2025 over-the-top-rope battle royal, featuring 30 wrestlers in what may have been one of the most stacked Royal Rumble matches ever.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Americans to spend 22% more on the Super Bowl this year: Survey
item.description: The LendingTree 2025 Super Bowl Spending Report survey covers everything from food and fan merch to sports betting.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Stunning trade sends Luka Doncic to Lakers, Anthony Davis to Mavericks
item.description: In what is one of the more surreal trades in the history of professional sports, the Los Angeles Lakers have sent away one of its franchise legends in exchange for a young superstar.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: A Blackhawks record: Landon Slaggert scores 7 seconds into a game against Florida
item.description: Landon Slaggert scored seven seconds into Chicago's game at the Panthers on Saturday afternoon — the fastest goal to start a game ever for the Blackhawks, according to the NHL record book.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU hits 14 three-pointers in fourth straight victory
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders made six of BYU's 14 3-pointers and scored 22 points to lead the Cougars to an 81-75 victory over UCF on Saturday for its fourth straight win. Mawot Mag added a season-high 19 points and matched a career-best with five assists for BYU (15-6, 6-4 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes fall to Oklahoma State, 81-72
item.description: STILLWATER, Okla. (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes are finding life on the road in the Big 12 tough in their first season in the conference.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Baseball Ethan Nunez gears up for sophomore year
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Just a year ago, Ethan Nunez had no college offers. Now, the Colorado Mesa infielder holds one of the highest honors in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference (RMAC). “I couldn’t believe it, honestly,” Nunez said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bolts' Geekie turning heads with unique pregame rituals
item.description: To steal a line from Michael Scott in "The Office," Conor Geekie isn't superstitious, but he is a little "stitious.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bill Walton to be honored at San Diego Gulls game with bobblehead giveaway, specialty jerseys
item.description: The San Diego Gulls will honor NBA legend Bill Walton at their game against the Toronto Marlies on Friday night, with the first 8,000 fans receiving a Bill Walton bobblehead.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
